name: Sunrun Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Sunrun's (the Company, our, we) mission is to connect people to the cleanest energy on earth. Sunrun transformed the solar industry in 2007 by removing financial barriers and democratizing access to locally-generated, renewable energy. Today, Sunrun is the nations leading provider of clean energy as a subscription service, offering residential solar and storage with no upfront costs.
